source_note: Schaefer 2018 (MIT) 400-parcel x Yeo 2011 (FreeSurfer/BSD-like) 17-network projection on fsaverage5, copied verbatim from Cortexia (D:\cortexia\assets\atlases).

files.name: schaefer400_vertex.npy
files.purpose: vertex_to_parcel array (int64, shape (20484,)) for Schaefer-400; -1 = medial wall

files.name: yeo17_vertex.npy
files.purpose: vertex_to_parcel array (int64, shape (20484,)) for Yeo-17; -1 = medial wall

files.name: schaefer400_to_yeo17.npy
files.purpose: Schaefer-400 parcel id -> Yeo-17 network id mapping (int64, shape (400,))

files.name: labels_schaefer400.json
files.purpose: human-readable parcel labels for Schaefer-400 (list of 400 strings)

files.name: labels_yeo17.json
files.purpose: human-readable network labels for Yeo-17 (list of 17 strings)

files.name: network_groups.json
files.purpose: 5-network rollup (visual/language/faces/attention/motion) with Yeo-17 index/label mappings; source = cortexia-network-groups-v1
